title: Vežba 45

questions.text:
Timu za podršku je objavila kratki vodič za rešavanje problema sa inicijalizacijom sistema:

Having boot issues?

Troubleshooting computer issues can feel overwhelming, but understanding them can make the process easier. Here's a simple step-by-step checklist for diagnosing and fixing computer boot problems:

1. Check the power connection: If the power cable isn't securely connected, the computer won't turn on.

2. Inspect the BIOS: If the BIOS is corrupted, the system might fail to boot. You may need to reset or update it.

3. Examine the hard drive: If the hard drive is failing, the operating system won't load. Run diagnostic tools to confirm.

4. Update drivers: If the software crashes, it could be due to outdated or incompatible drivers. Always keep drivers updated to prevent this.

5. Watch out for memory leaks: If the application has memory leaks, it can slow down or crash the system. Look for signs like freezing or lagging.

Following these steps can help you identify the root cause and get things running smoothly again.

Koje su znaci curenja memorije u sistemu?

answers.feedback: Vodič nije spomenuo naglo gašenje kao simptom curenja memorije.
Kushindwa kuanzisha mfumo kunahusiana na matatizo mengine, kama matatizo ya umeme au BIOS, si kuvuja kwa kumbukumbu.
Zastareli drajveri mogu izazvati pad sistema, ali nisu direktno povezani sa curenjem memorije.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.
explanation:
Vodič objašnjava da memory leaks mogu izazvati probleme sa performansama, kao što su slowing down ili freezing. Ovi simptomi su uočljivi i pomažu korisnicima da prepoznaju kada programi ne oslobađaju neiskorišćenu memoriju.

Obrati pažnju na deo u kojem vodič povezuje određene simptome (freezing, lagging) sa problemom (memory leaks), dajući korisnicima jasne pokazatelje za prepoznavanje problema sa performansama.
